compiled_state.title: Update ticket-tag.sh to dispatch through _tag_add_checked
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Update plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-tag.sh to call _tag_add_checked instead of _tag_add.

testing_mode: GREEN (activates PIL guard on CLI hot path; makes test 9 pass)

Change: _tag_add_checked "$1" "$2" instead of _tag_add "$1" "$2"

Note: The ticket dispatcher's routing of 'tag' subcommand to ticket-tag.sh is provided by dependency story 20f3-c62a. Task 3 modifies only ticket-tag.sh, not the dispatcher.

AC:
- ticket-tag.sh calls _tag_add_checked (not _tag_add directly)
- test_ticket_tag_cli_rejects_brainstorm_complete_without_pil passes GREEN
- bash tests/run-all.sh passes — all 9 new tests GREEN
- Error on PIL rejection contains 'Planning Intelligence Log' and '/dso:brainstorm'

Files: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-tag.sh (EDIT)
